Welcome to the seminar materials for the course **Probability & Statistics** at the HSE DSBA programme.

Each seminar contains a **Theory Review** (summarizing the main concepts covered in the lectures together with additional examples and simulations) and a corresponding **Problem Set** for practice.

## Seminars - Module 1

- **Seminar 1: Basics of Combinatorics**  
  [Theory Review](seminars/Seminar_1.html) · [Problem Set](problems/problem_set_01.html)

- **Seminar 2: Probabilistic Models**  
  [Theory Review](seminars/seminar_2.html) · [Problem Set](problems/problem_set_02.html)

- **Seminar 3: Bayes' Theorem**  
  [Theory Review](seminars/seminar_3.html) · [Problem Set](problems/problem_set_03.html)

- **Seminar 4: Discrete Random Variables**  
  [Theory Review](seminars/seminar_4.html) · [Problem Set](problems/problem_set_04.html)

- **Seminar 5: Expectation and Variance of Discrete Random Variables**  
  [Theory Review](seminars/seminar_5.html) · [Problem Set](problems/problem_set_05.html)

- **Seminar 6: Covariance, Correlation and the Weak Law of Large Numbers**  
  [Theory Review](seminars/seminar_6.html) · [Problem Set](problems/problem_set_06.html)

- **Seminar 7: Continuous Random Variables. Normal Distribution**  
  [Theory Review](seminars/seminar_7.html) · [Problem Set](problems/problem_set_07.html)
